user.title: Basic Settings
user.description: Configure the outdoor temperature sensor and the heating switch.

data_description.outdoor_temp_sensor: Sensor measuring the current outdoor temperature. Used for the heating curve – the colder outside, the higher the target temperature.
data_description.heating_switch: The switch that turns your heating on and off (e.g. boiler controller, heating relay).
data_description.enable_cooling: Enable if your system can also cool (e.g. heat pump with cooling mode).
data_description.cooling_switch: The switch that activates cooling mode. Only turns on when rooms are too warm.

controller.title: Climate Module Settings
controller.description: These settings determine how IHC controls heating. Choose between Switch mode (controls a central boiler) or TRV mode (controls individual thermostatic radiator valves).

data_description.controller_mode: Switch: IHC controls a central boiler via a switch entity. TRV: IHC sends setpoints directly to individual thermostatic radiator valves (Zigbee/Z-Wave TRVs). You can change this later in Options.
data_description.demand_threshold: Total heating demand (0–100%) at which the heating should turn on. Recommendation: 20–40%. Lower values = heating turns on earlier.
data_description.demand_hysteresis: Buffer to prevent the heating from constantly switching on and off. The heating only turns off when demand falls this much below the threshold. Recommendation: 5–10%.
data_description.min_on_time: Minimum number of minutes the heating must stay on before it can turn off again. Protects the boiler from short cycling.
data_description.min_off_time: Minimum number of minutes the heating must stay off before it can turn on again. Protects the boiler from short cycling.
data_description.min_rooms_demand: How many rooms must simultaneously request heat before the heating turns on. Prevents the heating from running for just one room.

temperatures.title: Temperature Presets
temperatures.description: Global temperatures for away and vacation modes.

data_description.away_temp: Target temperature for all rooms when 'Away' mode is active (e.g. nobody home during the day). Typical: 16–18 °C.
data_description.vacation_temp: Target temperature for all rooms in vacation mode. Frost protection only. Typical: 14–16 °C.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Please check the entity ID.

data.off_use_frost_protection: Use Frost Protection in OFF mode

data_description.outdoor_temp_sensor: Sensor measuring the current outdoor temperature. Used for the heating curve.
data_description.heating_switch: The switch that turns your heating on and off (e.g. boiler controller, heating relay).
data_description.enable_cooling: Enable if your system can also cool (e.g. heat pump with cooling mode).
data_description.cooling_switch: The switch that activates cooling mode.
data_description.demand_threshold: Total heating demand (0–100%) at which the heating turns on. Recommendation: 20–40%.
data_description.demand_hysteresis: Buffer against constant on/off switching. Recommendation: 5–10%.
data_description.min_on_time: Minimum run time of the heating in minutes. Protects the boiler from short cycling.
data_description.min_off_time: Minimum pause time of the heating in minutes. Protects the boiler from short cycling.
data_description.min_rooms_demand: How many rooms must simultaneously request heat before the heating turns on.
data_description.away_temp: Target temperature in Away mode for all rooms. Typical: 16–18 °C.
data_description.vacation_temp: Target temperature in Vacation mode. Frost protection only. Typical: 14–16 °C.
data_description.summer_mode_enabled: When enabled, heating is automatically blocked when outdoor temperature exceeds the threshold.
data_description.summer_threshold: Outdoor temperature above which Summer Mode disables heating. Typical: 15–20 °C.
data_description.show_panel: When disabled, the IHC dashboard is removed from the sidebar. All entities remain available.
data_description.presence_entities: Person or device tracker entities for presence detection. When all persons are away, IHC automatically switches to Away mode. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.frost_protection_temp: Minimum safety temperature. Even in OFF or Away mode, this temperature is never undercut. Recommendation: 7 °C.
data_description.night_setback_enabled: When enabled, target temperatures are automatically reduced at night (when the sun is below the horizon).
data_description.night_setback_offset: How many degrees the target temperature is reduced at night. Typical: 2–4 °C.
data_description.sun_entity: Sun entity used to detect day/night. Default: sun.sun
data_description.preheat_minutes: How many minutes before a scheduled period starts that heating begins pre-heating. 0 = pre-heat disabled.
data_description.boiler_kw: Nominal boiler power in kW. Used for energy estimation.
data_description.solar_entity: Power sensor for solar generation (W). When surplus exceeds the threshold, room temperatures are slightly boosted.
data_description.solar_surplus_threshold: Minimum solar surplus in watts before the solar boost is applied.
data_description.solar_boost_temp: How many degrees to add to target temperatures when solar surplus is available.
data_description.energy_price_entity: Sensor providing the current electricity price (€/kWh). Used to reduce heating when prices are high.
data_description.energy_price_threshold: Electricity price above which IHC applies the Eco offset to save energy.
data_description.energy_price_eco_offset: How many degrees to reduce target temperatures when electricity is expensive.
data_description.flow_temp_entity: Number entity used to write the target flow temperature (e.g. number.heizung_vorlauf). IHC writes the calculated setpoint here.
data_description.flow_temp_sensor: Sensor entity for reading the actual current flow temperature (e.g. sensor.vorlauf_temp).
data_description.cooling_target_temp: Target temperature when cooling mode is active. Typical: 24–26 °C.
data_description.controller_mode: Switch: controls a central boiler. TRV: sends setpoints directly to thermostatic radiator valves.
data_description.smart_meter_entity: Smart meter kWh sensor for actual energy consumption tracking.
data_description.weather_entity: Weather integration entity for forecast-based heating adjustments.
data_description.weather_cold_threshold: Temperature below which IHC applies the cold weather boost to rooms.
data_description.weather_cold_boost: Additional degrees added to target temperatures during very cold weather.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_sensor: Outdoor humidity sensor for dew point calculation and ventilation advice.
data_description.ventilation_advice_enabled: Show ventilation recommendations based on CO₂ and humidity sensor data.
data_description.adaptive_curve_enabled: IHC automatically adjusts the heating curve based on room temperature performance.
data_description.adaptive_preheat_enabled: IHC learns how long rooms take to heat up and adjusts pre-heat times automatically.
data_description.eta_preheat_enabled: Use calculated ETA (estimated time of arrival to target temp) for dynamic pre-heating.
data_description.vacation_calendar: Calendar entity (calendar.*) where vacation events are detected by keyword.
data_description.vacation_calendar_keyword: Keyword to look for in calendar event titles to detect vacation periods (e.g. 'urlaub').
data_description.startup_grace_seconds: Seconds to wait at HA startup before processing sensor data. Use 60–120 s for Zigbee/Z-Wave sensors that need time to report after reboot.
data_description.off_use_frost_protection: When system is in OFF mode, still maintain frost protection temperature instead of completely off.
data_description.stuck_valve_timeout: Seconds without valve movement (while demand > 0) before a stuck valve alert is triggered. Default: 1800 s (30 min).
data_description.limescale_protection_enabled: Periodically drive TRV valves through their full range to prevent calcification. Runs once per configured interval.
data_description.limescale_interval_days: How many days between limescale protection exercises. Recommendation: 14 days.
data_description.limescale_time: Time of day (HH:MM) when the limescale exercise runs. Choose a time when rooms are typically unoccupied.
data_description.limescale_duration_minutes: How many minutes to hold TRVs at maximum position during the exercise. Default: 5 minutes.

heating_curve.title: Heating Curve
heating_curve.description: Define up to 7 points of the heating curve. outdoor = outdoor temperature, target = base target temperature (before room offset).

data_description.name: A unique name for this room, e.g. 'Living Room' or 'Bedroom'.
data_description.temp_sensor: Temperature sensor in this room measuring the current room temperature.
data_description.valve_entity: Optional radiator thermostat (TRV) or climate entity in this room. If provided, the setpoint is automatically adjusted.
data_description.window_sensor: Optional window or door sensor. When open, the heating demand for this room is disabled.
data_description.room_offset: Correction value if the sensor is slightly inaccurate or mounted in a bad spot. Positive = sensor reads too cold.
data_description.deadband: Sensitivity of the control. Smaller value = reacts faster but switches more often. Recommendation: 0.5 °C.
data_description.weight: How much this room influences the total demand. Higher value = more influence. Recommendation: 1.0 for normal rooms.
data_description.comfort_temp: Desired temperature in Comfort mode (e.g. when someone is home). Typical: 20–22 °C.
data_description.eco_temp: Reduced temperature in Eco mode (e.g. at night or short absence). Typical: 17–19 °C.
data_description.sleep_temp: Temperature in Sleep mode. Usually cooler than Eco. Typical: 16–18 °C.
data_description.away_temp_room: Frost protection temperature when this room is set to 'Away'. Typical: 15–16 °C.
data_description.min_temp: Lowest temperature that must never be undercut (frost protection). Recommendation: 7–10 °C.
data_description.max_temp: Highest temperature that should not be exceeded. Protection against overheating. Recommendation: 25–28 °C.
